review_text: Battery dies in under 3 hours. My old headphones from a different brand lasted all day. Very disappointed.
These headphones keep disconnecting from my phone every 10 minutes. Completely unusable for calls.
Sound quality is decent but the battery life is really bad. Expected at least 12 hours for this price.
Arrived with a scratched headband. Packaging was damaged. Customer support took 3 weeks to respond.
Returned after 2 days. Battery barely lasts 2.5 hours and the charging cable is proprietary and weird.
Great sound quality for studio sessions! Only complaint is the battery could be better.
Bluetooth keeps cutting out. Was told it was a firmware issue but no update in 3 months.
At ₹3499 I expected ANC. SoundMax Pro has it for ₹2999. Hard to justify the price difference.
Ear cushions are thin and uncomfortable after just 30 minutes of wear. Build quality feels cheap.
Battery life is fine for short sessions. I wish the companion app had an EQ mode.
Amazing value for money! Great bass, comfortable, and battery lasts 2 days easily.
Solid headphones for the price. No issues with Bluetooth. Recommended for daily commuters.
Bought as a gift and the recipient loves them. Lightweight and the sound is surprisingly good.
Great bass heavy sound. Highs could be crisper but overall very happy at this price point.
Good headphones but cable inclusion would have been nice as a backup. Otherwise fine.
Absolutely love these! ANC is on par with Sony WH-1000XM5. Best purchase this year.
ANC works great in the office. Slightly heavy but the comfort and sound make up for it.
Perfect for gym. Stayed in ears during entire workout. Great 8-hour battery life.
These are now my daily drivers. Sweat-proof, comfortable, and sound quality is excellent.
Sound fills the whole room. Bass is incredible. Bought two — one for each floor of my house.
No app support is a big miss in 2025. Can't customize EQ or check battery level without guessing.
Bought these for WFH calls. Microphone quality is terrible. Echo on every call. Returning immediately.
If you just want music they are okay. But for calls or anything else they fall short.
Perfect for my kids! Loud enough for them, volume limited so no ear damage worries. Love it!
Best portable speaker for hiking and outdoor use under ₹2000. Waterproof and great battery.
Gym sessions are now way more fun. These buds stay in place even during running on treadmill.
Charging takes 3 hours and gives only 3 hours of usage. Ratio is unacceptable.
Call quality is the best in this price range. Clear microphone, comfortable fit for 8hr WFH sessions.
Good sound but left bud cuts out sometimes. Might be a defect but annoying nonetheless.
Sound quality is excellent for studio monitoring. Just wish the battery was not so limited.
The product description says 20h battery. Real world is under 3h. False advertising.
SoundMax Pro has better specs for ₹500 less. Hard to recommend these at current price.
Good for running. Neckband is comfortable. 8h battery is more than enough for daily use.
WooferMax bass is exactly what my home theatre setup needed. Incredible low end response.
Still going strong after 6 months. Very impressed for an entry-level product.
Decent build quality, stylish design. But competitors offer better specs for less money.
The volume knob stopped responding after 2 weeks. Defective unit. Warranty claim was a nightmare.
Worn for 3 hours straight at gym with zero ear fatigue. Sound quality better than expected.
Company should make more products like this. ANC, comfort, and battery are all world class.
Microphone quality not suitable for meetings. My team complained about background noise constantly.
Pretty good for the price! The bass is punchy and lows are tight. Happy with this buy.
I use these for music only and they are fine. Just do not expect pro features at this price.
Best workout buds ever. Never fell out once in 4 months of daily gym use. Battery = huge.
Gaming headset performance is solid. Boom mic is clear. Comfortable for long sessions.
Smart speaker is okay but setup was confusing. Voice assistant integration is buggy sometimes.
Returned. Bluetooth disconnects in the same room as the phone. Completely unacceptable.
Slept with these for 3 nights. Comfortable. Sleep sounds are soothing. Would buy again.
DJ quality from a Bluetooth set? Yes! Latency is impressive and the clamp force is perfect.
Bought based on YouTube reviews. Reality is different. Battery and Bluetooth both let you down.
Great sound isolation for a budget set. Background noise from office is mostly blocked.
Good earbuds but case hinge feels flimsy. Hope it lasts beyond the warranty period.
Studio monitor sound signature is accurate. Just need more battery life for long sessions.
Sleep mask + audio in one product is genius. Comfortable and the audio quality is pleasant.
Mic picks up background noise in busy offices. Otherwise headphones work fine for music.
Would not buy again. The value for money is not there when SoundMax Pro exists at lower price.
Travel speaker is loud and clear. Great for hotel rooms and outdoor dining settings.
Incredible headphones at this price. Comfort level is great all day. Highly recommend!
Charged overnight, full battery. By noon battery was dead. 3-4 hour battery. Unacceptable.
Functional product but falls short on battery and features compared to similarly priced rivals.
Best earbuds I have owned at any price. Sound, battery, and fit all exceed expectations.
Returned after one week. Battery life is nowhere near the advertised specs. Misleading listing.
ANC is strong and the sound profile is amazing. Slightly overpriced but worth it for the ANC.
Bedroom speaker has transformed my morning routine. Crystal clarity and room-filling bass.
Works as a monitor set for short studio stints. Long sessions require external power bank usage.
Excellent for the price. Slightly bass-heavy but that is a preference thing. Build feels solid.
Three emails to customer service about battery issue. No resolution in 60 days. Avoid.
IPX5 rating holds up. Used in rain and gym without issues. No corrosion on charging port.
Retro design looks great and surprisingly good audio quality for vinyl-style form factor.
There is no EQ in the app. No app. Just plug and play with poor battery. 2024 competitors do more.
Not ideal for hybrid calls. Picking up keyboard noise which distracts colleagues on meetings.
Value is questionable compared to SoundMax Pro but the audio tuning is excellent for music.
Month 4 and still performing like new. Build quality has held up well. Impressed overall.
App does not exist. Battery lasts 3h. Competition has 30h with ANC for same price. Hard pass.
These replaced my ₹5000 earbuds. Performance is genuinely better. Incredible value.
Worst headphone purchase of my life. Bluetooth drops, battery dies fast, no EQ support. Returned.
Gaming sessions with these are immersive. Boom mic catches everything and filters background noise.
Great little speaker. Use it camping and city outings alike. Battery life surprisingly good.
Decent monitoring sound but the battery situation needs a firmware or hardware fix urgently.
Survived 3 swim training sessions (just wore them around pool deck). Sweat proof claim is real.
For India rupee pricing, competitors simply offer more features. Price adjustment is overdue.
Family purchased this for my birthday. Genuinely the best headphones I have ever owned. Thank you!
Mix of pros and cons. Good for niche studio use but lacks daily driver battery life completely.
Best neckband earphones in budget category. Robust, lightweight, and the battery is outstanding.
I have used many headphones at this price. This one is the most disappointing battery experience.
Night-time listening is perfect now. Soft tips, great audio, and 10h means I never run out.
Sound profile suits classical and jazz very well. Just stock up on power banks for portability.
Children love these. Volume limit gives peace of mind and the design is fun and durable.
Connectivity issues persist. Customer support recommended a factory reset which did not help.
Colors look premium. The matte finish does not attract fingerprints. Build quality is solid.
Five colleagues own competing products with ANC and 25h+ batteries at same or lower price.
Professional DJ use: latency is minimal and the frequency response is balanced for mixing.
Trade-offs might work for some users but the industry has moved beyond 3h battery headphones.
Entry level product done right. Punchy sound, easy pairing, and long battery for the category.
Charging cable is a weird proprietary connector. Lost mine and replacement is not available online.
Sleeping with these feels natural. The audio is calming and the mask is breathable. 5 stars.
